titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 201: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 201. (A.R. No. 328 of 1910.) TIRUMEYJÑĀNAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall, central shrine, Jñānaparamēśvara temple.

This inscription is damaged in places. It records the exemption of taxes on an areca-garden and some land surrounded the same in consideration of 40 kaḻañju of gold and of a ten vēli of wet land of 13 kaḻañju by the peruṁguṟi-pperumakkaḷ of the mahāsabhā of Ārūrchchēri, a brahmadēya in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu in favour of the temple of Tirumayānattu-dēvar at Nālūr. Mention is made of an areca-garden belonging to a temple of god Samparēśvarattudēvar, as one of the boundaries of the former.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 393.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam Ārurcceri mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom ceṟ deyam nālūrt tirumayāṉattu lai Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭu tavar kamukan toṭṭamāṉa kamukan toṭṭattuk kellai kīḻpāṟk reśvattu tevar nilattukkum Ittevar kamukantoṭṭattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai peruṅkāl niroṭu kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai śampareśvattu tevar kamukantoṭṭattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Iārurcceri Ūrnatta key ḻikkut teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam kaṉṟuṅ ṟum Āṟiṭupaṭukaiyu muṭpaṭa Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Iññāṉkellaiyilu mukantoṭṭa muṟṟum cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyākac ceytu kuṭutta sabhaiyoṅ koṇṭa poṉ tiyppokku ṭu veṭṭiccūṭakaruttu kāyttu patu paḻaṅkāciṉoṭu rai� ppatu Ūrkkallāl koṇṭa poṉ 4 10ø Ippoṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻai Ipparicu kaiyyiley koṇṭu yiliyākac ceytu tom tirumayāṉamuṭaiya paramasvāmikku Ārurc
pperuṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Iṉṉam Ittevarkkey Iṟaiyiliyāka varkaḷ ceytu kuṭutta nila ppālaiyiṉ vaṭakkil Aiññūṟṟuva mayakka kku Ellai Ūrarinta peru nā ḻpāṟkellai kaviṇiyaṉ Araṅkaṉ māta navaṉitāyan sabhainokkik kiṭanta nilattukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai makavāyiṉ ṉiroṭu kālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ceṟṟūrt tirumuttirukoyiṟ tevar nilattukku vaṭapāṟkellai Āḻiyvāykā ṭu kālukkut teṟkkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam vāykkūṟṟup peruvaḻi vanta Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi ṟamai Ūroṭuṅ kalanta nirnilam pattu Ippattu Ēṟṟaikkum cantrātittava ceytu kuṭuttuk koṇṭa poṉ ṟuḷaiy 10 3ø Ippoṉ patiṉmukkaḻaiñcum koṇṭu cantrātittaval kuṭuttom I sabhaiyom Āka(ka) Ikkamukat toṭṭamum I ṟai Ili ceytu kuṭut Ippoṉ mukkaḻai koṇṭu cantrādittaval Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ittirumayāṉattup paramasvāmikku sabhai ṅkuṟip panmāhe
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
